step_by_step_thinking:
- Elevated LDH without any significant changes in typical markers like CA-125 suggest a less common type of ovarian cancer.
- Among the given options, only malignant teratomas typically show elevation in LDH due to their mixed germ cell content leading to increased metabolic demand.
